headline: Amazon Opens Logistics Network To Clients What It Means For Investors
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) has launched Amazon Supply Chain Services, opening its logistics, fulfillment, and delivery network to external businesses across sectors such as healthcare, automotive, manufacturing, and retail. The new offering targets large enterprises and brands, with early users including Procter & Gamble, 3M, Lands’ End, and American Eagle Outfitters. This move positions Amazon as a direct competitor to global logistics providers by offering its freight, warehousing, and...
